creator: matt@peterson.org
text:
An updated version of the shar factoring in the license bump change is  
available @ http://matt.peterson.org/tmp/sortu-port.txt

On Mar 10, 2008, at 5:57 PM, Matt Peterson wrote:

> A version bump exists that includes a freeware license, here's an  
> email from the author.  Likely the port needs the version number  
> bump'd and distfiles added.
>
> On Mar 10, 2008, at 5:40 PM, Gray Watson wrote:
>> Cool.  Sure thing.  I'll attach a freeware license.
>>
>> 	http://256.com/sources/sortu/sortu-2.1.0.tgz
>>
>> It's a derivation of the old bsd license.  Let me know if that's  
>> appropriate.
>>
>> thanks for the interest,
>> gray
